initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT item.i_category, store.s_store_id, SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2001
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 1
GROUP BY item.i_category, store.s_store_id
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  item.i_category,
  store.s_store_id,
  SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM
  store_sales
  JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
WHERE
  date_dim.d_year = 2001
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 1
GROUP BY
  item.i_category,
  store.s_store_id
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    item.i_category, 
    store.s_store_id, 
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001 
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 1
GROUP BY 
    item.i_category,
